svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Pipeline Sequence" id="pipeline1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-761" dy="-327" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="1300" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Ticket lifecycle · 9 steps, autonomous, no human in the loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="600" x="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg1sw" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00033E;strokeColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="18" x="1010" y="4" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg1tx" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5A5A5A;fontSize=11;" value="Okta issues / verifies a token" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="240" x="1036" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg2sw" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="18" x="1010" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg2tx" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5A5A5A;fontSize=11;" value="No Okta token movement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="240" x="1036" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="1 · inbound
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#5A5A5A;">Intake Service (external ticketing system)</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Ticket received via intake API. No Okta involvement yet.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00033E;strokeColor=#00033E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="2 · intake_auth
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#c7d4ff;">Atlas Triage</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Triage authenticates to Okta with its own key (private_key_jwt).</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="3 · intake_classify
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#5A5A5A;">Atlas Triage</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Claude classifies the ticket: department + urgency.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00033E;strokeColor=#0131FF;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="4 · a2a_exchange — hop 1
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#c7d4ff;">Atlas Triage → Atlas Resolution</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Intake Service bootstraps (client_credentials) → Triage exchanges for an id-jag → redeems it. Resolution is now authorized.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.shield2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1010" y="485" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4tx" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontColor=#0131FF;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="id-jag
act: {Triage}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="200" x="990" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="5 · devops_draft
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#5A5A5A;">Atlas Resolution</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Claude drafts the resolution / work notes. Resolution decides: self-serve, or route to a specialist.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00033E;strokeColor=#0131FF;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="6 · a2a_fulfillment — hop 2
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#c7d4ff;">Atlas Resolution → Atlas Fulfillment</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Resolution exchanges its token for an id-jag targeting Fulfillment → redeems it. The act claim now nests BOTH agents.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b6" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.shield2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1010" y="765" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b6tx" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontColor=#0131FF;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="id-jag
act nests 2 agents" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="200" x="990" y="820" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=#0131FF;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="7 · opa_vault
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#c7d4ff;">Atlas Fulfillment</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Fulfillment presents its INBOUND A2A token as the subject → Okta Privileged Access releases the vaulted Jira credential. No human involved — a machine subject authorizes the release.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b7" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.shield2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="50" x="1010" y="905" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b7tx" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontColor=#0131FF;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="vaulted secret
subject = agent's own
inbound token" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="220" x="990" y="960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="8 · jira_write
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#5A5A5A;">Atlas Fulfillment → Jira Cloud</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Fulfillment uses the released credential to create or resolve the real Jira issue.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="1020" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00033E;strokeColor=#00033E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=16;verticalAlign=middle;" value="9 · done
<font style="font-style:italic;font-size:11px;color:#c7d4ff;">Atlas (system)</font>
<font style="font-size:12px;font-weight:normal;">Case resolved: auto-resolved & customer notified, or routed to a specialist team. Every hop above is in the Okta System Log.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="760" x="200" y="1160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c12" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" div.div:
1 · inbound
Intake Service (external ticketing system)
Ticket received via intake API. No Okta involvement yet.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 3, 62), rgb(226, 228, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 3, 62), rgb(226, 228, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 742px; height: 1px; padding-top: 230px; margin-left: 19px;

div.div:
2 · intake_auth
Atlas Triage
Triage authenticates to Okta with its own key (private_key_jwt).

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 232, 228), rgb(41, 37, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(224, 218, 210), rgb(54, 49, 42));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 742px; height: 1px; padding-top: 370px; margin-left: 19px;

div.div:
3 · intake_classify
Atlas Triage
Claude classifies the ticket: department + urgency.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 3, 62), rgb(226, 228, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(1, 49, 255), rgb(146, 187, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 742px; height: 1px; padding-top: 510px; margin-left: 19px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4 · a2a_exchange — hop 1
Atlas Triage → Atlas Resolution
Intake Service bootstraps (client_credentials) → Triage exchanges for an id-jag → redeems it. Resolution is now authorized.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 547px; margin-left: 793px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0131FF, #92bbff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#00033E, #e2e4ff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5 · devops_draft
Atlas Resolution
Claude drafts the resolution / work notes. Resolution decides: self-serve, or route to a specialist.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 3, 62), rgb(226, 228, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(1, 49, 255), rgb(146, 187, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 742px; height: 1px; padding-top: 790px; margin-left: 19px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
6 · a2a_fulfillment — hop 2
Atlas Resolution → Atlas Fulfillment
Resolution exchanges its token for an id-jag targeting Fulfillment → redeems it. The act claim now nests BOTH agents.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 827px; margin-left: 793px;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 742px; height: 1px; padding-top: 930px; margin-left: 19px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
7 · opa_vault
Atlas Fulfillment
Fulfillment presents its INBOUND A2A token as the subject → Okta Privileged Access releases the vaulted Jira credential. No human involved — a machine subject authorizes the release.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 967px; margin-left: 793px;

div.div:
vaulted secret
subject = agent's own
inbound token

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 232, 228), rgb(41, 37, 34)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(224, 218, 210), rgb(54, 49, 42));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 742px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1070px; margin-left: 19px;

div.div:
8 · jira_write
Atlas Fulfillment → Jira Cloud
Fulfillment uses the released credential to create or resolve the real Jira issue.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 3, 62), rgb(226, 228, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 3, 62), rgb(226, 228, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 742px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1210px; margin-left: 19px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
9 · done
Atlas (system)
Case resolved: auto-resolved & customer notified, or routed to a specialist team. Every hop above is in the Okta System Log.
